subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Hearken unto the Call of the Friend, for verily He summoneth thee from this Vale which hath been named the Noble One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم ان استمع ندآء الخلیل انه ینادیک من هذا الواد الذی سمی بالنبیل فی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @words vs deeds, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
